n: The Crew: Brothers of the Queen

steps.t: Elladan and Elrohir went in search of Corsairs near Iáphel, intending to find any of the raiders who might have hidden after the attack.
Elladan and Elrohir will have returned to Ost Arndír by the time you get there.
Elrohir is at Ost Arndír, waiting to speak to you.
